Title: The boot reconcile
Summary: Every server start runs once over the whole Godot project and rewrites the JSON cache.
Body:
## What runs

After `app.listen` opens the port, the orchestrator in `server/src/lib/reconcile/bootReconcile.ts` walks the Godot project, parses every `.tres`, and rewrites the matching JSON in `data/<domain>/`.

The pass is cheap (about 60 ms on a 90 file corpus), idempotent, and runs before the live watcher starts so we do not double process churn during startup.

## What can go wrong

If reconcile fails on one file (e.g. a parser regression), the server logs the error and continues with whatever JSON is on disk. Better degraded than down. The error surfaces in the [Reconcile tab](/diagnostics/reconcile) with file path and reason, and bumps the header icon to amber or red.

Mappers throw on malformed required fields (e.g. `Slug = ""` on an Item) so those land in the errors bucket with accurate messages, instead of being mislabeled as "wrong script_class" skips.

## Auto discovery

Discovery does not use hardcoded paths. Files are bucketed by:

- `script_class` for Quest, KarmaImpact, FactionData, NpcData, DialogSequence, BalloonLine.
- `Slug = "..."` presence for items, so MedkitData, WeaponData, and any future ItemData subclass land in the items bucket without code changes.

DialogSequence files group by parent dir basename. BalloonLine files group by grandparent dir basename, with a defensive check that the immediate parent dir is named `balloons`.
